title: SUOXU Puppy Slow Feed Bowl, Stainless Steel Dog Bowl - Ideal for Puppy Weaning, Multiple Puppies, Food & Water (30cm)
features: 【Puppy Dish Large diameter】Size: 30cm ,Capacity:1.4L / 49oz ,Puppy slow eating bowl 30cm can provide enough feeding space for up to 5 puppies, 34cm can accommodate 7 puppies
【Safety】 Slow Eating stainless steel puppy bowl, the edge of the bowl is polished, very smooth, and will not harm the puppy
【Easy to clean】 puppy bowls only need to be washed with water, finely polished and smooth stainless steel bowls, washed as bright as new

【Thoughtful Design】The short side design of the puppy weaning bowl is very friendly to puppies and cats, perfect for puppies to share food or water. The bump in the middle of the dog food bowl prevents the puppy from sitting in the middle of the food

【Risk-free purchase】The dog bowl kit has passed strict quality inspection. If you are not satisfied, you can replace or refund-if you have any questions, please contact us first and we will solve your problem as soon as possible
